connectives.use: Use when you want to start a line of reasoning.
connectives.example: First of all, I focused on understanding the problem.
connectives.example_translation: Primeiramente, eu foquei em entender o problema.
connectives.mindset: I am starting my line of thought.

connectives.use: Very useful for storytelling because it creates context, tension, and narrative.
connectives.example: At that moment, we realized the project was at risk.
connectives.example_translation: Naquele momento, percebemos que o projeto estava em risco.

connectives.use: Very strong in interviews because it signals initiative, leadership, and action.
connectives.example: That's when I decided to redesign the entire workflow.
connectives.example_translation: Foi aí que eu decidi redesenhar todo o fluxo.
connectives.mindset: I am showing the moment when I decided to act.

connectives.example: We reorganized the process in order to improve efficiency.
connectives.example_translation: Nós reorganizamos o processo para melhorar a eficiência.
connectives.mindset: I am connecting action with purpose.

connectives.use: Use for contrast, change, or an unexpected problem.
connectives.example: We had a solid strategy. However, the execution failed.
connectives.example_translation: Tínhamos uma estratégia sólida. Porém, a execução falhou.
connectives.mindset: I am showing contrast and complexity.

connectives.example: Even though my English is still improving, I am constantly challenging myself.
connectives.example_translation: Mesmo com meu inglês ainda melhorando, eu continuo me desafiando.
connectives.mindset: This connects directly with my story of growth.

connectives.use: Very strong for reflection at the end of a story.
connectives.example: Looking back, that experience taught me how to lead under pressure.
connectives.example_translation: Olhando para trás, essa experiência me ensinou como liderar sob pressão.
connectives.mindset: I am showing learning and maturity.

powerful_verbs.example: I resolved a critical issue before launch.
I aligned the campaign with business goals.

phrases_that_save.translation: O que eu quero dizer é...
phrases_that_save.use: Use when you need time to clarify your thought.
Use when you want to correct yourself professionally.
Use when you want to return to the focus of the answer.

phrases_that_save.term: I may not know the exact term in English, but...
phrases_that_save.translation: Talvez eu não saiba o termo exato em inglês, mas...
phrases_that_save.use: Use instead of freezing when you forget a word.
A natural way to gain time while thinking.

situation.label: Situation
situation.example: We were preparing for a major event.

task.label: Task
task.example: The agency's delivery did not meet expectations.

action.label: Action
action.example: So I redesigned the entire visual structure myself.

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.example: That experience taught me how to work under pressure.

marketing_terms.definition: Framework used to analyze the user journey: Acquisition, Activation, Retention, Revenue, and Referral.
Prioritization method based on Reach, Impact, Confidence, and Effort.
The main metric that defines the long-term success of a product or strategy.
The rate at which users or creators stop using a product or platform.
The total value a user generates while staying connected to the platform.
The return generated from an investment.
Valuable observations or data extracted from analysis.
Communication efforts to reach new audiences, partners, or stakeholders.
A deep emotional connection between the user and the brand.

web3_terms.definition: The concept that creators can own their digital assets.
Organizations managed by blockchain rules and community voting.
Digital assets that give holders voting power in project decisions.
Exclusive content accessible only to people who hold a specific digital asset.
The economic ecosystem built by independent content creators.
A broader view that goes beyond managing isolated channels.
All groups involved or affected, such as creators, audiences, brands, and investors.
The ability of a solution to grow without losing quality or increasing costs proportionally.
Connection between team goals and company vision.
A strategy focused on real benefits for people or communities.
Interaction that goes beyond likes and focuses on depth and value.
